creator: mutoh@openedu.org
text:
Hi, I'm maintainer of misc/xtypo.

At Mon, 23 Oct 2006 19:50:30 UT,
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Please note that PR ports/104720 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

At Mon, 23 Oct 2006 15:42:16 -0400 (EDT),
Thomas Abthorpe <thomas@goodking.ca> wrote:
> -MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.hipecs.hokudai.ac.jp/pub/unix/ftp.intec.co.jp/
> +MASTER_SITES=	http://his.luky.org/ftp/mirrors/ftpmirror/

I check this patch, this MASTERSITE is a mirror of ftp.intec.co.jp.
The ftp.intec.co.jp is a primary distribute site of xtypo.

So , please use below:
	MASTER_SITES=   ftp://ftp.intec.co.jp/pub/utils/

Thank you.
--
Takeshi MUTOH <mutoh@openedu.org>
